code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut prev = 0
  mut has_prev = false
  mut sorted = true
  mut in_num = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut cur = 0

  while i <= n
    let b = if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        -1
      end
    else
      -1
    end

    let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
    let is_sign = b == 45 or b == 43

    if in_num and (not is_digit)
      let val = cur * sign
      if has_prev
        if val < prev
          sorted = false
        end
      end
      prev = val
      has_prev = true
      in_num = false
      cur = 0
      sign = 1
    end

    if is_digit
      if not in_num
        in_num = true
      end
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    else if is_sign and (not in_num)
      in_num = true
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
      end
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  if sorted
    println("YES")
  else
    println("NO")
  end
end
